rollback_or_no_call_policy: No clinical release until workflow change impact is reviewed and validated
next_action: Define frozen workflow version evidence after approved benchmark execution.

rollback_or_no_call_policy: No clinical interpretation if reference build or annotation provenance changes without revalidation
next_action: Define reference asset version-lock policy before clinical release.

rollback_or_no_call_policy: No clinical interpretation if sample identity pairing or checksum policy changes without review
next_action: Attach approved input-acceptance impact assessment after benchmark assets are approved.

rollback_or_no_call_policy: No small-variant reportable evidence until caller/filter change is revalidated
next_action: Require HG008 small-variant truth evidence before approving caller/filter changes.

rollback_or_no_call_policy: No CNV/LOH or scarHRD evidence until CNV tool changes are revalidated
next_action: Require allele-specific CNV/LOH overlap evidence before approving CNV tool changes.

rollback_or_no_call_policy: No SV signature or rearrangement evidence until SV caller changes are revalidated
next_action: Require reciprocal-overlap evidence before approving SV caller changes.

rollback_or_no_call_policy: No integrated HRD interpretation until adapter/model changes are revalidated
next_action: Require model calibration and no-call validation before approving HRD adapter changes.

rollback_or_no_call_policy: No threshold can be locked without validation evidence and signoff
next_action: Attach validation evidence and reviewer signoff before changing lock_status.

rollback_or_no_call_policy: No clinical report generation until language changes are approved
next_action: Require reviewer approval for permitted/prohibited report-language changes.

rollback_or_no_call_policy: No benchmark execution or interpretation until asset change is approved and checksummed
next_action: Rebuild approval packet and checksums after any truth/input asset change.

rollback_or_no_call_policy: No packet section is unblocked until linked evidence and signoff are complete
next_action: Review evidence links and packet completeness before any signoff change.

rollback_or_no_call_policy: No clinical release without named reviewer/lab-director approval and completed evidence packet
next_action: Define named signoff workflow only after all validation evidence sections are complete.
